hero.title: Packers & Movers in Tamil Nadu
hero.subtitle: Chennai to Coimbatore, Madurai to Salem — 8,287+ verified movers across 27 cities in Tamil Nadu.

intro:
Tamil Nadu's strong industrial base, thriving IT sector and coastal geography make it one of South India's most dynamic relocation hubs. ShiftIndia connects you with 8,287+ verified vendors across Chennai, Coimbatore, Madurai, Salem, Trichy, Thanjavur, Erode, Tirunelveli and 19 more cities.

From Chennai's OMR IT corridor to Coimbatore's textile factories and Madurai's heritage districts, our verified movers understand Tamil Nadu's diverse urban landscape and the special care needed for long coastal and hill-route moves.
whyUs: Chennai's apartment societies, Coimbatore's industrial freight needs and the monsoon-prone coastal routes of Tamil Nadu demand experienced, insured movers. Our vendors carry full ₹5 lakh damage protection, provide GPS-tracked vehicles and work around Tamil Nadu's local festival calendars and rain seasons.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Tamil Nadu?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves start at ₹3,500. Chennai to Coimbatore 2 BHK moves typically cost ₹9,000–₹15,000. Exact pricing depends on distance, inventory and packing level.

faqs.q: Which cities in Tamil Nadu does ShiftIndia cover?
faqs.a: We cover 27 cities including Chennai, Coimbatore, Madurai, Salem, Trichy, Tirunelveli, Vellore, Thanjavur, Erode, Dindigul, Cuddalore, Chengalpattu, Ooty and more.

faqs.q: Do you handle moves during Tamil Nadu's monsoon season?
faqs.a: Yes. Our vendors use waterproof packing materials and schedule moves to avoid the heaviest northeast and southwest monsoon windows, especially for coastal and delta-region routes.

faqs.q: Can you relocate goods between Tamil Nadu and other South Indian states?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle inter-state moves to Karnataka, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh and Telangana with proper documentation, insurance and real-time GPS tracking.
